title: Garlicky Flaky Vietnamese Chicken Bake
description: A kid-friendly, lowcarb Vietnamese chicken bake packed with garlicky flavor, flaky tenderness, and a splash of sherry vinegar for a bright finish.

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: use stevia or coconut sugar for extra low carbs

instructions: Pat chicken dry with paper towels and season with salt and pepper.
Heat peanut oil in a large oven‑proof skillet over medium‑high heat; sear chicken thighs for 2–3 minutes per side until golden brown, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add minced garlic and ginger; sauté for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in soy sauce, fish sauce, sherry vinegar, honey, and chili flakes; cook for 1 minute to blend flavors.
Return chicken to skillet, spoon sauce over each piece, and transfer skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake for 18–20 minutes, or until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Remove from oven, sprinkle chopped cilantro and sliced scallions on top.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
